footer.description: An interactive guiding platform aiming to facilitate the rituals of Umrah and visitation step-by-step, clarifying the pillars, duties, and prohibitions based on the Quran and purified Sunnah in a simplified and visually engaging manner.
footer.duaText: "O Allah, make it an accepted Umrah, a forgiven sin, and a appreciated effort."
footer.tagline: Made to serve the guests of the Most Merciful

errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.errorLoadFailed: Could not load page, please try again.

items.text: Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk, Labbayka la sharika laka Labbayk, Innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk, la sharika lak
And complete the Hajj and 'umrah for Allah
Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire
An Umrah to another Umrah is an expiation for what is between them, and the accepted Hajj has no reward other than Paradise
O Allah, open for me the gates of Your mercy
Indeed, as-Safa and al-Marwah are among the symbols of Allah
O Allah, increase this House in honor, greatness, reverence, and awe
O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, abundant provision, and healing from every illness
There is no deity except Allah alone, with no partner, His is the dominion and His is the praise, and He is over all things competent
The pilgrims of Hajj and Umrah are the delegation of Allah, He called them and they answered Him, and they asked Him and He gave them
